text:
Midonite Government Environment Protection Bureau (, Midonite Seifu Kankyō Hogo-kyoku) is a government agency from Midonite that tasks its workers with investigating and preserving places and/or locations. Hunter × Hunter: Altar of Dragon Vein 

Overview

The government assigns their agent Romaria with investigating and preserving the Forest Ruins in the Wollow Forest and the Underground Ruins in the Rockwall area. 

Subsections

Preservation Department: A subsection of the government where their agent Romaria was to deliver her report to. 

Plot

Altar of Dragon Vein

The Midonite Government Environment Protection Bureau assigns their investigation officer Romaria to investigate the Forest and Underground Ruins. Romaria hires Amateur Hunter Ponzu and later enlists the help of the Hunter Association. The Hunters reveal a conspiracy by former Hunter Zegin Highline and his group's devious goal of unlocking the incredible power known as the Dragon Vein. Its location was deep within the Forest Ruins and foil it. With that done and over with as well as the collection of the Goddess Advent Cards, Romaria finishes her report to turn into the Preservation Department.
